mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cctv_info (cctv_id, cctv_name, road_name, latitude, longitude, stream_url, district, is_active, updated_at) VALUES (#{cctvId}, #{cctvName}, #{roadName}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{streamUrl}, #{district}, #{isActive}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (cctv_id) DO UPDATE SET cctv_name = EXCLUDED.cctv_name, road_name = EXCLUDED.road_name, latitude = EXCLUDED.latitude, longitude = EXCLUDED.longitude, stream_url = EXCLUDED.stream_url, district = EXCLUDED.district, is_active = EXCLUDED.is_active, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT cctv_id, cctv_name, road_name, latitude, longitude, stream_url, district, is_active, updated_at FROM cctv_info ORDER BY updated_at DESC
